jobs.title: Ad Ops Campaign Coordinator
jobs.description: View All Jobs For Employers Join Log In   View All Jobs     Summary Generated by Built In Company Summary EchoStar is reimagining the future of connectivity. Our business reach spans satellite television service, live-streaming and on-demand programming, smart home installation services, mobile plans and products. Today, our brands include Boost Mobile, DISH TV, Gen Mobile, Hughes and Sling TV. Department Summary Our DISH Media Ad Sales team, headquartered in New York City with additional offices in Chicago, Denver, and Los Angeles, empowers brands to reach their target audiences seamlessly across the DISH and Sling platforms. Specializing in data-driven addressable and programmatic advertising solutions, this innovative and passionate team excels in navigating the dynamic TV advertising landscape. Job Duties and Responsibilities Candidates must be willing to participate in at least one in-person interview. As the operational heartbeat of our Media Sales team, you ensure that hundreds of linear and digital advertising campaigns reach their audiences with perfect precision. You solve the challenge of executing complex ad insertions across Dish and Sling platforms while safeguarding revenue through meticulous quality assurance. By managing inventory and troubleshooting technical hurdles in real-time, you ensure our clients achieve their marketing goals and our platforms maintain optimal performance. What Success Looks Like (Objectives) Enter order details, targeting parameters, and ad insertion instructions into management systems for addressable campaigns on Dish and Sling Execute rigorous quality assurance on campaign setups to ensure content airs and bills accurately, directly preventing revenue loss Manage advertising inventory and in-flight delivery across diverse networks and audiences to maximize revenue and meet advertiser goals Identify and resolve technical execution issues by collaborating with engineering, finance, and IT teams to troubleshoot performance

jobs.title: Product Manager II, AI and Ecommerce Innovation
jobs.description: View All Jobs For Employers Join Log In   View All Jobs     Summary Generated by Built In Company Summary EchoStar is reimagining the future of connectivity. Our business reach spans satellite television service, live-streaming and on-demand programming, smart home installation services, mobile plans and products. Today, our brands include Boost Mobile, DISH TV, Gen Mobile, Hughes and Sling TV. Department Summary Our Retail Wireless team, serving our Boost Mobile and Gen Mobile brands, is redefining consumer expectations through new platforms, new business models and new ways of thinking. Equipped with a passion for change and the power to drive it, we continue to push boundaries and be a disruptive force in the market. Job Duties and Responsibilities Candidates must be willing to participate in at least one in-person on-site interview. Visa sponsorship not available for this role. We are seeking a Product Manager II, Innovation to lead the discovery, definition, and validation of AI-powered experiences across our digital sales channels. This role operates at the intersection of strategy, technology, and customer experience-shaping long-term initiatives while validating opportunities that expand market share and operational efficiency. As a Product Manager II, you will play a critical role in moving core business metrics through innovative technology and AI. This role accelerates our ability to turn AI innovation into measurable outcomes while ensuring long-term strategic investments are validated, scalable, and customer-centric. Key Responsibilities: Identify and shape high-impact AI opportunities across eCommerce and digital sales, including personalization, recommendations, guided selling, intelligent checkout, and support automation Translate long-term strategic priorities into clear product hypotheses, MVP definitions, and structured learning roadmaps to validate value quickly Partner with Design, Engineering, AI Office, and Business stakeholders to define prob

jobs.title: Account Executive, Enterprise - Northern FL
jobs.description: View All Jobs For Employers Join Log In   View All Jobs     Summary Generated by Built In About Zscaler Zscaler accelerates digital transformation to ensure our customers can be more agile, efficient, resilient, and secure. As an AI-forward enterprise , we are constantly pushing the envelope, leveraging the world’s largest security data lake to power our cloud-native Zero Trust Exchange platform. This innovation protects our customers from cyberattacks and data loss by securely connecting users, devices, and applications in any location. Here, impact in your role matters more than title and trust is built on results. We say, impact over activity. We seek innovators who actively use AI to amplify their impact and who thrive in an environment where we leverage intelligent systems to stay ahead of evolving threats. We believe in transparency and value constructive, honest debate —we’re focused on getting to the best ideas, faster. We build high-performing teams that can make an impact quickly and with high quality. To do this, we are building a culture of execution centered on customer obsession , collaboration, ownership, and accountability. We value high-impact, high-accountability with a sense of urgency where you’re enabled to do your best work and embrace your potential. If you’re driven by purpose, thrive on solving complex challenges, and want to be part of the team that’s helping to secure the AI age, we invite you to bring your talents to Zscaler and help shape the future of cybersecurity. About the Role We are looking for an Account Executive to join our Sales and Go-to-Market team. This role is based in the greater Tampa or Orlando area, reporting to the Regional Director. You will be part of a global group of professionals passionate about delighting our customers, nurturing trusted partnerships, and sharing expertise to drive a secure, cloud-enabled digital future. By demonstrating the power and agility of cloud transformation, you will help cement our pos

Checkmarx is the leader in application security and ensures that enterprises worldwide can secure their application development from code to cloud. Our consolidated platform and services address the needs of enterprises by improving security and reducing TCO, while simultaneously building trust between AppSec, developers, and CISOs. At Checkmarx, we believe it's not just about finding risk, but remediating it across the entire application footprint and software supply chain with one seamless process for all relevant stakeholders.
